description: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic and western Arabic numerals. Dated: Sivan 5482 AM which is May-June 1722 CE. The account heading states that the monthly entries are listing payments from R. ʿAkūbas from a prior debt acknowledgment deed. The names of a few other individuals appear below the accounts: Yosef Gostarī, Yahuda b. Benyamin Ergaz, Sarah bt. David Gostarī. Below these names there is an intriguing but unclear reference to "Fusṭāt"–which is not commonly referenced as such in early modern fragments. MCD.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
